description.part1: Full Stack Developer with a pragmatic approach: I build reliable applications designed to last and scale over time. I always start by understanding the real goals of a project, not by imposing a specific tech stack.
description.part2: Every project has its own constraints and priorities. Sometimes, a simple and well-thought-out solution is more than enough. Other times, a more robust architecture is required. I choose my tools based on what actually solves the problem, not on what is trending.

java_dev.title: Java Development
java_dev.description: Design of Spring Boot APIs and development of plugins for Minecraft and Hytale (Paper, Velocity, BungeeCord), focused on performance and maintainability.

web_dev.title: Web Development
web_dev.description: Building modern and efficient web applications with a strong focus on architecture and user experience.

admin.title: System Administration
admin.description: Linux server management: deployment, security hardening, performance optimization, and production maintenance.

support.title: Support & Architecture
support.description: Debugging assistance, code audits, architecture guidance, and technical support for existing projects.

contact.title: Would you like to contact me?
contact.description: Feel free to send me a message using the form or the contact methods below. I will respond as soon as possible.

content.part1: I have been interested in technology for several years, especially in understanding what happens behind the scenes. This curiosity naturally led me to software development as well as system administration. I enjoy building applications just as much as designing and maintaining the infrastructure that powers them.
content.part2: Over time, I have worked on personal projects, explored a wide range of technologies, and gained experience managing servers, web services, and production environments. This hands-on approach has given me a broader understanding of how a project evolves, from the initial idea to deployment and long-term maintenance.
content.part3: My curiosity goes beyond software. I also enjoy experimenting with electronics and embedded systems through personal projects. Building a weather station, designing an alarm system, or automating everyday tasks are opportunities to connect the physical and digital worlds while expanding my technical knowledge.
content.part4: Outside of technology, I value activities that require consistency, patience, and continuous improvement. Climbing and calisthenics have taught me the importance of perseverance, while gardening offers a different pace that helps me disconnect, reflect, and return to projects with a fresh perspective.
content.part5: Every experience, whether technical or not, shapes the way I approach challenges. I enjoy analyzing problems, understanding their root causes, and building solutions that are reliable and maintainable. More than just a profession, technology is a field of continuous learning for me, where there is always something new to explore, understand, and improve.

BlogPage.description: Articles covering a wide range of topics in technology, development, and system administration, all written in English.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section_1_text: I do not collect any personal data except for the information submitted via the contact form. This information is used solely to respond to your requests and is deleted after use.
privacy.section_2_text: The collected data is used only to respond to your inquiries. It is never shared with third parties unless necessary for communication management.
privacy.section_2_item_2: Handling requests via the contact form
privacy.section_3_text: I use a self-hosted tracker to analyze website performance. No data is collected for profit purposes. Tracker link: https://rybbit.farmeurimmo.fr
privacy.section_4_text: For any questions regarding this privacy policy or to exercise your rights, you can contact me by email or via the contact form.
privacy.contact_form_label: Contact form available on the website.
privacy.third_party_services_text: Please note that some third-party services, such as Vercel and Cloudflare, may collect information related to site performance and security. These services are used solely to optimize the user experience and not for profit.
privacy.third_party_v2: Cloudflare: Site security and protection against attacks

projects.title: My current and old projects
projects.description: Discover my past and current projects here. They are all open source and available on my GitHub account. You may find more projects on my GitHub account.
